channel.title: GitHub Pascal Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Pascal in GitHub

item.title: doublecmd/doublecmd
item.description: Double Commander is a free cross platform open source file manager with two panels side by side.

item.title: benjamimgois/goverlay
item.description: Goverlay is an easy graphical interface to configure linux gaming applications

item.title: joaopauloschuler/neural-api
item.description: CAI NEURAL API - Pascal based deep learning neural network API optimized for AVX, AVX2 and AVX512 instruction sets plus OpenCL capable devices including AMD, Intel and NVIDIA.
